context: Tests whether the agent implements correct error wrapping, credential safety, configuration validation, and HTTP resilience patterns in the Auth and Client layers of an API integration.

checklist.name: Auth includes HTTParty
checklist.description: Auth class includes HTTParty (or equivalent HTTP library include) rather than using Net::HTTP directly

checklist.name: Auth credential validation
checklist.description: Auth initializer raises an error (any exception) when required credentials are blank/nil — does NOT silently accept missing credentials

checklist.name: No hardcoded credentials
checklist.description: Auth class reads credentials from Rails configuration or environment variables — no literal credential strings appear in the source files

checklist.name: Auth token caching
checklist.description: Auth#token (or equivalent method) caches the fetched token in an instance variable and returns the cached value on subsequent calls

checklist.name: Client::Error class
checklist.description: Client defines a nested Error class inheriting from StandardError (not from RuntimeError or a generic base)

checklist.name: HTTP error wrapping
checklist.description: Client's request method rescues HTTParty::Error (or equivalent HTTP library error) and re-raises as Client::Error

checklist.name: JSON error wrapping
checklist.description: Client's request method rescues JSON::ParserError and re-raises as Client::Error

checklist.name: Timeout configured
checklist.description: Client or Auth configures a timeout (DEFAULT_TIMEOUT constant or timeout option passed to HTTP calls) — not left at default/unlimited

checklist.name: Missing config raises Client::Error
checklist.description: Client initializer raises Client::Error (using MISSING_CONFIGURATION_ERROR or similar message) when token or host is blank

checklist.name: Retry constant
checklist.description: Client or Fetcher defines DEFAULT_RETRIES (or equivalent) as a numeric constant — retry count is not a magic number inline

checklist.name: Spec covers error path
checklist.description: client_spec.rb contains at least one test case for error handling (network failure, JSON parse error, or missing configuration)
